sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76143" key="o)fio/neos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀφῐό-νεος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὄφις</etym>) <sense id="n76143.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of, belonging to</tr_>, or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a serpent</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:237" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.237</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:436" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.436</biblScope> </bibl> [where <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">ῑ</pron>].</sense> </entryFree>
